videos.title: Ford Ranger Raptor OFF-ROAD HONEST REVIEW by Jeep & Toyota Owners (Rocky Mountain River Trail)
videos.description:
Is the Ford Ranger Raptor the ultimate off-road machine, or just a flashy truck? We decided to settle the debate as die hard Jeep and Toyota owners, and took a Ford Ranger Raptor out to the Rocky Mountains. This wasn't just a casual drive—we pushed this Raptor through the river trails to see where it shines and where it falls short. If you’re considering switching from a Jeep or Toyota to a Raptor, this honest review is for you.

videos.title: Power BI Finally Has a Date Picker — No More Workarounds?
videos.description:
Have you ever needed users to pick one specific date in Power BI without using a workaround?

For years, report authors had to get creative with slicers, custom visuals, DAX, or report design tricks to create a simple date picker experience. Now Power BI has a new Date Picker slicer option, and Patrick LeBlanc from Guy in a Cube is going to put it side by side with one of his older workaround approaches.

In this video, Patrick shows how the new Power BI Date Picker works, how it compares to the

videos.title: Is ontology replacing the semantic model?
videos.description:
Everyone is asking the same question:
"Is Microsoft Fabric Ontology replacing semantic models?"

At first glance, it seems like it might. Both sit above your data, provide business definitions, and help users understand information without digging through raw tables.

But that's where the similarity ends.

In this video, Marthe explains why Fabric Ontology is not simply a better semantic model and why the distinction matters—especially as AI agents become a core part of the analytics experience.

videos.title: You're learning AI wrong. Here's the fix #AI #Management #Leadership #FutureOfWork
videos.description:
I watched the people who actually survived their company's AI rollout, and they all figured out one thing: AI isn't a tool skill, it's a management skill. The skills that make you good at AI aren't prompting skills — they're people skills. Closing the AI fluency gap on your team starts here. Get my newsletter 👉 https://natesnewsletter.substack.com

videos.title: Claude Code's Evolution of Memory
videos.description: The best practices for using Claude Code have quietly changed. If your workflow is still based on guides from early this year, you're likely missing out on Claude's most powerful new capabilities. In this video, we'll break down the three biggest shifts for using Claude Code effectively: improving its memory with community tools, leveling up your planning with new commands, and automating your workflows. You'll learn how to spend less time managing Claude and more time getting useful work done.

videos.title: 5 Ways Claude Tag Could Change How You Use AI
videos.description:

Power Apps.feature_name: Enforce modern look across model-driven apps
Power Apps.description: Making the modern look universal gives you a consistent, accessible, and modern experience. Organizations benefit from simplified governance, reduced support overhead, and reliable rollout of UX improvements across environments, freeing admins and makers to focus on solutions rather than maintaining UI exceptions.

Power Automate.feature_name: Measure time and cost savings for desktop flows
Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: This feature is designed for teams that want to demonstrate the business impact of desktop automation. It lets you automatically calculate time and cost savings compared to pre-automation processes, without relying on manual tracking or spreadsheets. These insights help you clearly show return on investment, justify automation initiatives, and communicate value to business stakeholders and Centers of Excellence.

Power Automate.feature_name: Encrypt and decrypt data with PGP
Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: This feature is for organizations that exchange sensitive data with partners using Pretty Good Privacy (PGP) standards. You can automatically encrypt and decrypt data using PGP keys, reducing manual handling and human error. This helps you meet security and compliance requirements, speed up integrations with external systems, and avoid building and maintaining custom PGP solutions.

Power Automate.feature_name: Capture video logs in unattended runs
Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: Unattended desktop flow runs often fail without clear visual context, forcing makers and support teams to reproduce issues manually or rely on incomplete logs. Existing tools, such as action logs, screenshots, and run‑history metadata, provide useful data but are sometimes insufficient, especially when failures stem from transient UI issues, timing conflicts, pop‑ups, or unexpected system behavior. Logging unattended failures can be significantly harder when only textual logs and screenshots are

Microsoft Copilot Studio.feature_name: See a unified view of errors, warnings, and governance notifications
Microsoft Copilot Studio.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Microsoft Copilot Studio.description: This feature helps organizations enable safe innovation without slowing makers down. By clearly surfacing governance constraints early and consolidating all errors and notifications in one place, makers spend less time debugging late-stage failures and more time building compliant solutions. Customers benefit from reduced support friction, higher maker success rates, and better adherence to organizational policies - driving faster adoption and more predictable outcomes in governed environments.

Microsoft Dataverse.feature_name: Build Dataverse solutions with coding agents using Dataverse skills
Microsoft Dataverse.product_group: Enable AI powered business workflows in Work IQ with Dataverse
Microsoft Dataverse.enabled_for: Users by admins, makers, or analysts
Microsoft Dataverse.description: By using coding agents, you can eliminate the need to manually create Microsoft Dataverse tables and solutions through the UI. Dataverse skills guide coding agents to connect to your environment and build solutions by using tables, relationships, forms, and views. This process also includes creating sample data.

Microsoft Power Platform governance and.feature_name: Prevent sending sensitive data to Purview audit logs
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.product: Microsoft Power Platform governance and administration
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.enabled_for: Users by admins, makers, or analysts
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.description: This feature restricts customer business data in Dataverse audit logs from being sent to Purview auditing streams. This helps ensure compliance and reduces the risk of leaking sensitive customer data.
